name: pi-native-web-search
description_en: Adds a web_search tool powered by Anthropic's native web search — no third-party API key needed. Always runs via claude-haiku-4-5 for fast, cheap retrieval with source URLs.
description_zh: 添加由 Anthropic 原生网络搜索支持的 web_search 工具 — 无需第三方 API 密钥。始终通过 claude-haiku-4-5 运行，以进行快速、廉价的检索并带有源 URL
